message:
test(pty,logs): add comprehensive unit tests for PTY controller and logs package

- internal/pty/controller_test.go: Extended with ReadLine, Options, error handling,
  resource cleanup, special character, and platform support tests. Coverage: 90.1%
- internal/pty/controller_windows_test.go: New Windows stub tests
- internal/logs/gemini_test.go: Added asInt64 type conversion tests (json.Number,
  string, int, float64), asMap, extractInt64, token field parsing, and event type
  parsing tests. Coverage: 80.9%

Closes caam-ojjb, caam-mef9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
